title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
